PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF TERESA LAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVEN HO THE AMOUNT OF $500.00, THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERT SHIBATE RECOVER NOTHING, AND THAT PLAINTIFFS RECOVER $500.00 IN PROPERTY DAMAGE FROM DEFENDANT STEVEN HO.
